ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_no" TEXT /* Order number assigned to the purchase order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier who is fulfilling the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being ordered */,
  "total_order_value" REAL /* Total value of the order in Indian Rupees (in Lakhs) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the order was last updated */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date when the order should be delivered */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the order was delivered */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments regarding the order */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the order */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was approved */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare facility where the order is intended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Supplier rating based on performance and reliability */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number of the supplier */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account details for payment processing */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the supplier */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the supplier (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit conducted on the supplier */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., Lab Items, Drugs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item in Indian Rupees */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier who provides the item */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the item */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the item */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number or version of the item */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_purchased_price" REAL /* Price of the item during the last purchase */,
  "last_purchased_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for the item to be delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement officer, financial manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare facility */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the facility */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the facility */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order for which the payment is made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments regarding the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
